clause_text: The Employee shall, during the subsistence of his employment with Infotrend Systems Pvt. Ltd., devote his whole time, attention and abilities exclusively to the business of the Company. The said Employee shall not, without the prior written consent of the Board, directly or indirectly engage or be concerned in any other trade, business or occupation whatsoever during the continuance of this Agreement. This restriction is limited to the period of active employment and shall cease to operate upon cessation thereof, in accordance with Section 27 of the Indian Contract Act, 1872.

During the tenure of her employment with Aarogya Pharma LLP at its Hyderabad facility, the said Employee shall not, whether on her own account or as a director, partner, consultant or employee of any other entity, engage in the manufacture, formulation or marketing of generic oncology drugs. It is clarified that this covenant is operative only during the subsistence of the employment and shall stand discharged on the effective date of resignation or termination.

The Consultant hereby covenants with M/s Bharat Manufacturing Industries Pvt. Ltd. that during the term of this Consultancy Agreement he shall not render advisory, technical or strategic services of a similar nature to any other manufacturer of electrical switchgear operating in India. This restriction shall automatically lapse upon the expiry or earlier termination of this Agreement. Nothing herein shall be construed to restrain the Consultant from practising his lawful profession beyond the said term.

WHEREAS the Employee has been appointed as Senior Software Architect, it is hereby agreed that during the continuance of his services with Kestrel Technologies Pvt. Ltd., he shall not undertake any freelance, moonlighting or concurrent engagement in the field of information technology without prior written approval. The covenant is strictly confined to the duration of active employment and imposes no restraint whatsoever on the said Employee post-separation.

The said Associate shall, throughout the period of her retainer with Mehra & Chopra Advocates, Mumbai, not appear as counsel or advise any client whose interests are adverse to a client of the Firm. She shall further not accept engagement with any other legal practice during such period. These obligations are limited to the term of the retainer and do not, in any manner, operate to restrain her from practising law thereafter.

During the term of employment with Saral EdTech Pvt. Ltd., Bengaluru, the Employee shall not, directly or indirectly, be associated with any other K-12 online tutoring venture in any capacity. The parties acknowledge that this obligation, being operative solely during the subsistence of employment, is consistent with the duty of fidelity owed by an employee and is not hit by Section 27 of the Indian Contract Act, 1872.

The said Relationship Manager of HDB Capital Advisors Pvt. Ltd. undertakes that during the subsistence of her employment she shall not solicit, service or advise any client of a competing wealth management firm. The restriction shall apply to the territory of the National Capital Region only during active service and shall not survive her last working day.

It is expressly agreed that the said Plant Manager shall, for so long as he continues in the employment of Deccan Steel Forgings Pvt. Ltd. at its Pune unit, not hold any equity interest exceeding five per cent in any rival forging or casting enterprise. This covenant shall cease to have effect on the date of his relieving from service and shall not in any manner restrict his right to be subsequently employed in the same industry.

The Employee agrees that during the period of her employment with Lumen FMCG India Pvt. Ltd. she shall not, in her personal capacity, enter into any arrangement with a distributor, stockist or retailer of competing personal care products. The said restraint shall operate only concurrently with her employment and shall lapse ipso facto on cessation of service.

The Consultant retained by Vedanta Biosciences Pvt. Ltd. for the specified engagement period of twelve months shall not, during the said period, provide consulting services to any other biosimilars developer operating in India. Upon expiry of the Agreement, the Consultant shall be at full liberty to pursue any lawful engagement of her choice without any encumbrance from the Company.

The said Employee, holding the post of Area Sales Manager with Konark Cements Ltd., Odisha, shall not during the currency of her service undertake any employment, agency or distributorship with any other cement manufacturer. She shall further refrain from trading, on her own account, in building materials of a like nature. The restraint is confined to the term of employment.

The Employee shall devote his entire working time to the affairs of Trident IT Services Pvt. Ltd. and shall not, during the subsistence of this Agreement, accept any other paid or honorary position with any other company engaged in application development or systems integration. This obligation is operative only during employment and shall stand extinguished upon exit, in deference to Section 27 of the Indian Contract Act, 1872.

It is agreed between Ganga Pharmaceuticals Pvt. Ltd. and the said Medical Representative that during his term of service he shall exclusively promote the Company's products and shall not carry detailing, samples or literature of any competing pharmaceutical firm within the territory of Lucknow assigned to him. The restriction is strictly co-terminus with employment.

The Designer engaged by Anandini Couture LLP shall, for the duration of her retainer, exclusively design collections for the Firm and shall not sell, license or commercialise any competing apparel designs through any other house during the said period. The parties acknowledge that upon expiry of this Agreement, the Designer is free to work with any other fashion label of her choosing.

The said Principal Scientist with Aravalli Agri Research Pvt. Ltd. shall not, during the period of her employment, carry out research or publish findings relating to hybrid seed development for or on behalf of any other agri-biotech organisation. This covenant subsists only for so long as the employment continues and no further.

The Employee, engaged as Chief Dealer on the fixed income desk of Saraswat Securities Pvt. Ltd., shall not, during his term of employment, trade on his personal account in any sovereign or corporate bond except in accordance with the Company's Personal Account Dealing Policy. He shall further not undertake proprietary trading for any other broking firm. The restraint shall cease upon his ceasing to be in the employ of the Company.

WHEREAS the Company is engaged in the business of specialty chemicals, the said Employee shall during his tenure with Krishna Specialty Chemicals Pvt. Ltd. not engage, either for remuneration or gratis, in any competing chemicals enterprise. Upon separation, no restraint whatsoever shall be imposed upon the Employee, and he shall be entitled to practise his profession freely as contemplated by Section 27 of the Indian Contract Act, 1872.

The Junior Associate of Bhandari Legal Chambers, Delhi, shall during the currency of her employment not accept briefs independently nor appear on behalf of any other chamber or law firm. Nothing herein shall be deemed to prevent her from engaging in pro bono or legal aid work approved by the Managing Partner, nor from pursuing any professional engagement after the termination of this contract.

The Employee hereby agrees that during his employment with Meridian EdTech Pvt. Ltd. as a Curriculum Lead, he shall not provide content, lectures or courseware to any other online learning platform operating in the Indian test-preparation segment. The said covenant is restricted to the duration of his employment and shall automatically stand dissolved thereafter.

It is covenanted by the said Assistant Manager of Shree Rajasthan Textile Mills Ltd. that throughout his employment he shall not involve himself, whether as a proprietor, partner or employee, in any other textile manufacturing concern in the State of Rajasthan. The said restriction is intended to preserve the Company's legitimate business interests during the period of service and shall not extend beyond it.

The said Chief Financial Officer of Nimbus Logistics Pvt. Ltd. shall, during the tenure of his employment, not serve as a director, advisor or office-bearer of any other logistics, supply-chain or warehousing company operating in India. This obligation does not extend beyond cessation of employment and the Officer shall not be fettered from undertaking any such role thereafter.

The Employee, appointed as Product Manager with Fintara Digital Payments Pvt. Ltd., agrees that while in the service of the Company she shall not be engaged in any capacity with any other payments, UPI or neobanking venture. This restraint is limited in time to the period of her employment and in scope to directly competing product verticals.

It is agreed between the parties that Mr. Rohit Deshmukh shall, in his capacity as Technical Consultant to Sahyadri Heavy Engineering Pvt. Ltd. for the Project period, not simultaneously consult for any other OEM engaged in the manufacture of pressure vessels. Upon conclusion of the Project, the Consultant shall stand fully released from the said obligation.

The said Employee employed as Quality Assurance Manager at Godavari Dairy Foods Pvt. Ltd. shall not, during the continuance of his employment, work on his personal account as a consultant, contractor or adviser to any other dairy or milk-products enterprise. The restriction operates only during employment in conformity with Section 27 of the Indian Contract Act, 1872.

Subject to and during the continuance of this Retainership, the said Consultant shall not provide strategic advisory services to any other non-banking financial company licensed under the Reserve Bank of India Act operating in the gold loan segment. Post-expiry of this Retainership, the Consultant may freely pursue engagements with any entity of her choosing.

The Employee hereby undertakes, during her employment with Chinmaya Learning Systems Pvt. Ltd. as a Subject Matter Expert in Mathematics, not to author, record or license educational content for any rival EdTech platform serving the Indian school market. This obligation shall remain in force for the duration of her employment only.

The said Assistant Vice President (Credit) of Oriental Commercial Finance Pvt. Ltd. shall, for the period of his active employment, not accept any advisory mandate from any other lender, debt fund or credit-rating agency. This covenant shall not survive his last date of employment and shall not restrict his future professional pursuits.

The Technical Director engaged by Maithri Robotics Pvt. Ltd., Chennai, shall during his engagement exclusively dedicate his expertise in industrial automation to the Company and shall not, for remuneration or otherwise, render similar services to any competing systems integrator. The obligation is time-bound to the duration of his engagement.

The said Designer engaged with Hastkala Handlooms LLP undertakes that during her retainer she shall not design, create or supply any similar handloom collection to any other label or exporter. The parties acknowledge that this Agreement imposes no post-term restraint on the Designer, whose artistic livelihood is protected under Section 27 of the Indian Contract Act, 1872.

During his tenure as Head of Procurement at Tirupati Steel and Alloys Pvt. Ltd., the said Employee shall not have any direct or indirect financial interest in any vendor or supplier who bids for or services the Company. Further, he shall not accept any concurrent employment in the metallurgy sector. These obligations shall stand extinguished upon his separation from the Company.

The Employee, designated as Junior Research Fellow with Panacea Lifesciences Pvt. Ltd., shall during the period of her employment not undertake any parallel research engagement with any academic or commercial laboratory in the field of monoclonal antibody development. Upon cessation of employment, she shall be free to pursue any research opportunity of her choice.

It is hereby covenanted by the said Store Manager of Swadesh Retail Mart Pvt. Ltd. that during her employment she shall not be engaged, whether as proprietor or employee, in any competing retail grocery store situated within a radius of five kilometres from her assigned store location. This restraint shall apply only during active employment and shall not survive the last working day.

The said Senior Advocate-on-Record with Roy & Sen Legal Associates, Kolkata, agrees that during her term of association she shall not take up independent litigation matters outside the Firm nor appear in Courts on behalf of any client other than through the Firm, save with prior written consent of the Managing Partner. The restraint subsists only during the term of her association.

The Employee, while in the service of Citrus Digital Marketing Pvt. Ltd. in the capacity of SEO Analyst, shall not directly render digital marketing services to any of the Company's competitors nor accept any freelance assignment in the same vertical. The obligation is wholly operative during the tenure of employment and no obligation of any kind shall endure beyond that period.

The Consultant hereby covenants with Bharatiya Urja Renewables Pvt. Ltd. that during the twelve month consulting engagement for the solar rooftop programme, he shall not consult for any other solar EPC contractor operating in the States of Gujarat or Maharashtra. On termination or expiry of this Agreement the said restriction shall ipso facto lapse.

The said Employee, serving as Assistant Manager (Formulations) with Shakti Ayurveda Pvt. Ltd., Haridwar, shall not during the subsistence of her employment engage in any allied ayurvedic or nutraceutical venture on her personal account. The covenant shall lapse upon her ceasing to be in the employ of the Company and shall impose no post-employment restraint whatsoever.

The said Employee covenants with Zenith Cloud Solutions Pvt. Ltd. that during his employment and for a period of six months thereafter, he shall not, in any manner whatsoever, solicit, entice away or service any customer of the Company with whom he was in direct commercial contact during the last twelve months of employment. This restriction, being narrowly tailored to the protection of the Company's customer connections and trade secrets, is asserted as reasonable and not falling within the mischief of Section 27 of the Indian Contract Act, 1872. The notice period of employment shall be seven calendar days, terminable by the Company at will.

The Employee shall, during the subsistence of his employment with Vanguard Pharma Research Pvt. Ltd. and for a further period of ninety days from the date of cessation thereof, not accept employment with any entity to which he has been introduced in a business capacity during the course of his duties with the Company. Such restraint shall be construed as a reasonable measure for the safeguarding of confidential research methodologies and proprietary molecule data. The notice period shall be fifteen days on either side, notwithstanding anything contained elsewhere.

The said Senior Vice President of Skyline Investment Advisers Pvt. Ltd. hereby covenants that during his employment and for three months immediately thereafter, he shall not use, divulge or exploit the Company's proprietary client portfolio data to solicit any High Net-worth Individual client to a competing firm. Breach hereof shall entitle the Company to liquidated damages of Rs. 50,00,000/- (Rupees Fifty Lakh only) in addition to injunctive relief. The Company reserves the right to terminate this employment forthwith on payment of one month's basic salary in lieu of notice.

During the period of her employment with Ekalavya EdTech Pvt. Ltd. and for six months after the effective date of separation, the said Head of Content shall not render services to any competing EdTech platform offering UPSC or SSC preparation in India. The Company contends that such restraint is strictly ancillary to protection of its proprietary pedagogy and learner analytics and is therefore not hit by Section 27. Failure to comply shall trigger forfeiture of any unpaid variable compensation and stock options vested at the time of separation.

The Employee, appointed as Chief Technology Officer with Aether Semiconductor Design Pvt. Ltd., agrees that during his service and for a period of four months post-termination, he shall neither solicit any customer nor hire any employee of the Company, it being recognised that such a restraint is strictly necessary to protect the Company's trade secrets and IP portfolio. This Agreement may be terminated by the Company on ten days' written notice without assigning any reason whatsoever.

The said Partner of Nirmal & Co. Chartered Accountants undertakes that during his association with the Firm and for six months thereafter, he shall not solicit or accept any client engagement from any client of the Firm whom he serviced in the preceding two years. It is asserted that this covenant operates only qua specific client relationships cultivated at the Firm's cost and is not a general restraint on the practice of the profession. Notice of separation shall be thirty days on the side of the Partner but may be shortened unilaterally by the Managing Partner.

The Consultant engaged by Parakram Defense Systems Pvt. Ltd. for the avionics sub-programme acknowledges that during the engagement and for one hundred and eighty days post-expiry, he shall not provide consultancy services to any other entity working on a comparable indigenous avionics platform for the Indian armed forces. The said restriction is predicated on the protection of classified design data and is thus contended to be enforceable notwithstanding Section 27 of the Indian Contract Act, 1872.

The Employee shall not, during the term of her employment with Ardent FinTech Pvt. Ltd. and for ninety days following cessation, engage in the solicitation of any merchant acquirer or payment aggregator client which the Company had onboarded during the said Employee's tenure. The Employee further acknowledges that the restricted period is co-extensive with the period required to protect bespoke algorithmic risk models. The notice period during the first twelve months of service shall be only seven days.

For a period of six months from the last working day with Trinetra Surveillance Systems Pvt. Ltd., the said Head of Sales shall not approach, canvass or negotiate with any client listed in Schedule A hereto, being clients personally handled by him during his employment. The Company asserts that this is a narrow non-solicit predicated on misuse of proprietary pricing sheets and does not constitute a restraint of trade. The Employee may be relieved on seventy-two hours' notice at the Company's discretion.

The said Chief Formulator of Himalayan Botanicals Pvt. Ltd., Dehradun, hereby covenants that during his employment and for a period of one hundred and twenty days thereafter, he shall not engage in any activity involving the formulation of herbal cosmetic products that draws upon the Company's proprietary recipes and stability data. Breach hereof shall entitle the Company to claim liquidated damages equivalent to twelve months' gross salary and to pursue injunction. Termination by the Company may be effected on five working days' notice.

The Employee, in her capacity as Head of Quant Research with Arjun Alpha Capital LLP, agrees that for six months after ceasing employment she shall not join any fund that trades Indian equities or derivatives utilising statistical arbitrage strategies substantially similar to those she had access to while employed. This covenant is pleaded as narrowly tailored to protection of proprietary alpha signals and trade secrets. Garden leave of up to ninety days may be imposed by the Company at its sole discretion.

The said Area Head (South India) of Samriddhi Microfinance Pvt. Ltd. covenants that during her employment and for six months following exit, she shall not solicit any Self-Help Group or Joint Liability Group borrower serviced by her branch to any other microfinance institution. Notice period shall be fifteen days on the side of the Employee and seven days on the side of the Company. The restraint is posited as protective of goodwill developed at the Company's cost.

The Employee engaged as Principal Engineer with Marut Aerospace Pvt. Ltd. agrees that for a period of one hundred and eighty days post-termination, he shall not accept employment with any Indian OEM engaged in the design or manufacture of unmanned aerial systems in the MTOW class of 25 to 150 kilograms. Such restraint is justified, in the Company's contention, by protection of ITAR-adjacent technical know-how. The Employee's notice period is sixty days but may be waived by the Company to accelerate effect.

The Consultant hereby covenants with Satyam Legal Process Outsourcing LLP that during and for a period of six months following the expiry of this Agreement, he shall not undertake any engagement with any of the Firm's American Law Firm clients listed in Annexure B. Said covenant is contended to be strictly confined to protection of client relationships and documented work product and not a general restraint on legal process work.

The said Employee, holding the position of Senior Brand Manager with Yamuna Beverages Pvt. Ltd., agrees that during her employment and for a period of four months following her relieving, she shall not accept any marketing or brand strategy role with any manufacturer of carbonated soft drinks operating in India. This post-employment covenant is predicated on the protection of confidential consumer insight reports and shall be enforceable, in the Company's submission, despite the provisions of Section 27.

The Employee hereby agrees that upon exit from Varun Solar EPC Pvt. Ltd., and for a period of ninety days thereafter, he shall not solicit any power-purchase agreement counterparty or State DISCOM personnel known to him through his role. The said restraint shall operate only qua counterparties in respect of whom the Employee had direct negotiating responsibility and is hence contended to be narrowly circumscribed. Notice of termination by the Company may be as short as seven working days.

The Employee, engaged as Vice President (Product) with Lotus Logistics Tech Pvt. Ltd., covenants that during her employment and for six months post-separation she shall neither solicit nor employ any colleague who was a direct or indirect report to her within the preceding twelve months. This covenant is asserted as a reasonable non-solicit limited to preservation of the workforce investment of the Company. Garden leave not exceeding ninety days may be imposed during the notice period.

The Employee shall, on termination of his employment with Prakash Insurance Brokers Pvt. Ltd., for a period of one hundred and twenty days thereafter, not approach any insurer or reinsurer with whom the Company has a broking arrangement for the purpose of competing broking services. The said restraint is pleaded as a narrow non-solicit directed at client relationships and confidential commission structures and not a general restraint of trade.

The Founder-Director covenants with the Investors that for a period of twelve months following cessation of her service with Aaranya Organics Pvt. Ltd. on account of voluntary resignation, she shall not establish or promote any competing venture in the packaged organic foods segment in India, given that the restriction is tied to the protection of the brand goodwill and confidential supply-chain architecture generated during her tenure. The Agreement may be terminated by the Board on thirty days' written notice.

It is covenanted by the said Promoter that for a period of eighteen months after he ceases to be a shareholder of Navayuga HealthTech Pvt. Ltd., he shall not directly or indirectly engage in the business of telemedicine aggregation in India, subject to the continuing obligations of confidentiality in respect of proprietary care pathways. The Promoter acknowledges receipt of adequate consideration by way of ESOP acceleration and contends that the restraint is accordingly reasonable.

The said Key Managerial Personnel of Oakridge SaaS Pvt. Ltd. hereby agrees that during the term of her employment and for a further period of one hundred and eighty days thereafter, she shall not hire or engage any employee of the Company nor cause such employee to leave the service of the Company. This restraint is asserted as necessary for preservation of a cohesive product engineering team built at considerable cost to the Company and is not a general restraint on trade.

The Consultant engaged by M/s Indira Renewables Pvt. Ltd. for the wind resource assessment exercise covenants that during this Agreement and for a period of six months thereafter he shall not accept any consulting mandate from any competing IPP in respect of the specific wind zones mapped hereunder. The restraint is contended to be confined to project-specific know-how and not to the Consultant's general expertise in wind energy assessment.

The Employee, serving as Head of Clinical Operations with Vaidya Clinical Research Pvt. Ltd., undertakes that for a period of one hundred and twenty days after exiting the Company she shall not, directly or indirectly, render services to any Clinical Research Organisation in respect of any study previously managed by her. Termination of the Employee may be effected by the Company on payment of fifteen days' salary in lieu of notice, irrespective of the contractually specified notice period.

The said Employee appointed as Regional Manager with Patanjali Natural Foods Pvt. Ltd. covenants that during his employment and for six months thereafter he shall not enter into any agency or distributorship agreement with any retailer, modern trade account or general trade stockist within his assigned territory which he had on-boarded on behalf of the Company. This restraint, limited to territorial overlap and client specific, is asserted not to offend Section 27.

The Co-Founder agrees that for a period of twelve months following his exit from Tarangini Gaming Studios Pvt. Ltd., he shall not develop, publish or commercially exploit any real-money gaming title substantially similar to the Company's flagship rummy product, this restraint being tied to the confidential game-economy modelling and user-acquisition data disclosed to him. The said restriction is contended to be reasonable and enforceable in view of the consideration received by the Co-Founder in the Series A transaction.

The said Associate Director of Raghav Legal Advisors LLP covenants that during her association and for a period of six months after exit, she shall not solicit any client of the Firm for whom she acted as relationship partner in the preceding twenty-four months. This is asserted as a narrow client-specific non-solicit. The Firm may relieve the Associate on seven days' notice, notwithstanding the stipulated three-month notice on her side.

The Employee, in her capacity as Head of Data Science with Indira AI Labs Pvt. Ltd., shall not, for a period of six months after her last working day, join any company engaged in the development of generative AI products for the Indian BFSI vertical. This covenant is pleaded on the narrow ground of protection of proprietary training data curation and fine-tuning methodology. Notice period is fourteen days on either side.

It is agreed between Vedika Auto Components Pvt. Ltd. and the said Design Engineer that for a period of one hundred and twenty days immediately following separation, he shall not accept employment with any Tier-1 automotive supplier to the OEMs listed in Schedule III hereto. The said restriction being limited in time, geography and customer set is pleaded as reasonable in character and tied specifically to protection of jig and fixture drawings disclosed during employment.

The Employee hereby agrees and covenants that, for a period of three years from the date of cessation of his employment with Maharaja IT Consulting Pvt. Ltd., howsoever occasioned, he shall not be engaged, employed or in any manner concerned with any company, firm or entity engaged in the business of information technology services anywhere in the territory of the Republic of India. Breach hereof shall entitle the Company to an injunction and liquidated damages of Rs. 1,00,00,000/- (Rupees One Crore only). The said restraint shall be binding upon the Employee notwithstanding the provisions of any law for the time being in force.

The said Employee shall not, at any time during the period of five years computed from the date of relieving from Jai Hind Textiles Pvt. Ltd., engage directly or indirectly, whether for himself or for any third party, in the business of textile manufacture, wholesale, retail or export, anywhere within the Indian subcontinent. This covenant shall survive the termination of employment irrespective of cause and is intended to be perpetual qua the industry.

The Employee covenants with Sarathi Pharma Pvt. Ltd. that for a period of four years after separation from employment, she shall not take up employment, consultancy, directorship or any other engagement with any pharmaceutical, nutraceutical or medical devices company anywhere in the world. The Company shall be entitled to specific performance and the Employee waives any defence under Section 27 of the Indian Contract Act, 1872.

The said Manager shall, for an indefinite period following cessation of his employment with Bharat Heavy Industries Pvt. Ltd., not engage in any trade, profession or business of a like nature to that conducted by the Company, in any part of India or abroad. The Employee shall be obligated to obtain prior written permission of the Board before taking up any subsequent employment anywhere, failing which he shall be liable for damages.

It is hereby covenanted that the said Employee shall, for a period of seven years after the termination of her employment with Shree Mahalaxmi Jewellers Pvt. Ltd. (howsoever caused), not be associated in any capacity with any jewellery retailer, wholesaler or manufacturer operating anywhere in the States of Maharashtra, Gujarat, Karnataka, Tamil Nadu, Telangana, Andhra Pradesh, Kerala, Madhya Pradesh and Rajasthan. Such restraint is intended to be co-extensive with the goodwill of the Company regardless of the Employee's livelihood concerns.

The Employee agrees that after the termination of her employment with Garuda Defence Electronics Pvt. Ltd., she shall not, for the rest of her professional career, be engaged in any activity involving the design, manufacture or sale of radar, sonar or electronic warfare systems, either in India or abroad. This restriction is absolute and no relief from the same shall be available to the Employee on any ground whatsoever.

The said Consultant undertakes that upon expiry of this Consultancy Agreement with Neelgiri Hospitality Ventures Pvt. Ltd., he shall not, for a period of five years thereafter, render services of any nature to any hotel, restaurant or hospitality establishment anywhere in the country. The restraint shall be enforceable as a matter of contractual bargain and the Consultant shall have no right to rely on Section 27 of the Indian Contract Act, 1872 to avoid the same.

The Employee hereby agrees that for a period of four years following the cessation of her services with Chandra EdTech Pvt. Ltd., she shall not engage in any activity connected with the business of education, training or content creation, whether online or offline, anywhere in India. Further, during the said four year period, she shall not even pursue self-employment or entrepreneurial ventures in the said sector without the prior written consent of the Company.

The said Employee of Parivartan FinCorp Pvt. Ltd. covenants that for a period of thirty-six months from the date of his resignation or termination (whichever is earlier), he shall not be engaged, whether as employee, director, consultant, agent or otherwise, in any NBFC, bank, fintech, housing finance company or asset reconstruction company in the Union of India. The said restraint is absolute and is not subject to severance on the ground of unreasonableness.

It is expressly agreed that the Employee shall not, at any time within five years from the effective date of her relieving from Tulsi Consumer Goods Pvt. Ltd., render any services whatsoever (including homemaker consulting, blogging or influencer activity) relating to fast-moving consumer goods, personal care, household care or packaged foods anywhere in the Indian Union. Any such engagement shall entitle the Company to forfeit all gratuity, leave encashment and bonuses otherwise payable.

The Employee hereby irrevocably agrees that for a period of six years after separation from Aatmanirbhar Engineering Works Pvt. Ltd., he shall not, anywhere in the world, be associated in any manner whatsoever with any enterprise engaged in heavy engineering, capital goods or fabrication. The Employee acknowledges that he has no independent livelihood interest that overrides this bargain.

The said Consultant shall, for the remainder of his natural working life, not engage in, or provide consulting services to, any enterprise competing with the Business of Vishwakarma Robotics Pvt. Ltd. anywhere in India or abroad. The Consultant acknowledges that this lifetime covenant is of the essence of the Agreement and waives any right to challenge its enforceability under any statute including Section 27 of the Indian Contract Act, 1872.

Notwithstanding anything elsewhere contained, the Employee shall upon the cessation of his services with Kaveri Automotive Pvt. Ltd. remain bound, for a period of five years thereafter, not to work for, consult for, invest in or otherwise assist any manufacturer of two-wheelers, three-wheelers, four-wheelers, commercial vehicles or automotive components anywhere in the world. The Employee hereby waives and relinquishes any and all defences available under the Indian Contract Act, 1872.

The Employee agrees that for forty-eight months post-termination of her employment with Madhuri Media Networks Pvt. Ltd., she shall not appear on screen, behind the camera, or as a writer, director or producer for any media or entertainment enterprise based out of India or servicing Indian audiences, irrespective of platform. The restraint is absolute and the Employee admits that the same has been imposed in consideration of her general training in the media industry.

The said Employee shall not, for a period of five years after leaving the employment of Prithvi Agro Chemicals Pvt. Ltd., directly or indirectly carry on, be engaged in, or be interested in, any business dealing in seeds, fertilisers, pesticides or agricultural inputs in any part of India. The Employee further agrees not to seek any employment in the agriculture sector in any capacity during the said period, whether for remuneration or otherwise.

The Employee hereby agrees that at no time following the termination of her employment with Rashtriya Cyber Solutions Pvt. Ltd. shall she take up any work, assignment or engagement in the cybersecurity, information security or IT audit sectors anywhere in India, and this restraint shall endure in perpetuity. The Employee admits that this restriction is reasonable and voluntarily waives any protection afforded by Section 27 of the Indian Contract Act, 1872 or any analogous law.

With effect from the date of execution of this appointment letter at Ahmedabad between Vaayu Finserv LLP and Rhea Yadav, the parties acknowledge that, by reason of Section 27 of the Indian Contract Act, 1872, any post-employment restraint on lawful profession or trade shall be void, and accordingly the restrictive covenants set out herein shall operate only during the currency of employment.  The parties record that nothing in this clause shall restrict the Employee, on cessation of employment, from practising his or her lawful profession, trade or business, consistent with the protection afforded by Section 27 of the Indian Contract Act, 1872.  This clause shall be read in harmony with the Employee's fundamental right under Article 19(1)(g) of the Constitution of India to practise any profession or to carry on any occupation, trade or business on cessation of employment.

Pursuant to the engagement of Sanjay Joshi by Shree Foods Pvt. Ltd. at its media and entertainment operations at Coimbatore, the Employee shall, during the subsistence of his or her employment with Vistara Networks Pvt. Ltd., devote whole time and attention exclusively to the business of the Company and shall not engage in any parallel trade or occupation, directly or indirectly, whether for consideration or otherwise.  The Employee's obligations under this clause are separate from and additional to the confidentiality, non-solicitation and intellectual property obligations set out elsewhere in this shareholder agreement, which shall each operate independently and in accordance with their terms.  The Employer's sole remedy for any breach of this clause during employment shall be injunctive relief and damages, and not forfeiture of accrued salary or benefits.

The restrictive covenant contained in this clause shall operate only during the period of active employment and shall automatically cease upon cessation thereof, in compliance with Section 27 of the Indian Contract Act, 1872.  The Employee's obligations under this clause are separate from and additional to the confidentiality, non-solicitation and intellectual property obligations set out elsewhere in this consultancy agreement, which shall each operate independently and in accordance with their terms.  This clause shall be read in harmony with the Employee's fundamental right under Article 19(1)(g) of the Constitution of India to practise any profession or to carry on any occupation, trade or business on cessation of employment.

Pursuant to the engagement of Ajay Bhatt by Virat Edutech Pvt. Ltd. at its hospitality operations at Pune, during the term of engagement under this appointment letter, the Consultant shall not accept any assignment from a direct competitor of Kusuma Pharmaceuticals Pvt.
